intent.declared_purpose: Assemble prior authorization packet for cardiac catheterization procedure
intent.business_justification: Payer Aetna requires clinical documentation for CPT 93458 prior auth; agent pulling minimum necessary clinical fields.

control_mappings.control_language: Implement hardware, software, and/or procedural mechanisms that record and examine activity in information systems that contain or use electronic protected health information.
control_mappings.auditor_narrative: AuditLayer recorded AI agent PriorAuthCopilot (agt_priorauth_07) reading PHI record mrn:EP-8847213 on 2026-04-18 14:22:09 UTC from Epic Hyperspace, authorized by nurse u_4412, with minimum-necessary assertion and human approval within 32 seconds.

control_mappings.control_language: Minimum necessary. A covered entity must make reasonable efforts to limit protected health information to the minimum necessary to accomplish the intended purpose.
control_mappings.auditor_narrative: Agent declared purpose (prior authorization packet) and accessed only 5 clinical fields scoped to the target CPT code 93458.

control_mappings.control_language: The entity implements logical access security software, infrastructure, and architectures over protected information assets to protect them from security events.
control_mappings.auditor_narrative: Non-human principal (AI agent) access to regulated data asset was authenticated, logged, and tied to a human principal accountable for the session.

control_mappings.control_language: High-risk AI systems shall technically allow for the automatic recording of events (logs) over the lifetime of the system.
control_mappings.auditor_narrative: Event logged with model version, system prompt hash, input/output hashes, and tamper-evident hash chain.
